name: Baked Pasta Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1 medium zucchini, cut into thin strips
1 medium red pepper, cut into strips
1 10 oz. package of frozen chopped spinach, thawed & well-drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions for 7 minutes; drain.
2. Transfer pasta to a 13x9" baking dish.
3. In a skillet, cook and stir zucchini, red peppers, mushrooms, and scallions in hot olive oil for 3-4 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and spoon over the pasta.
5. Whisk flour into the drippings in the skillet, then whisk in milk, add broth, nutmeg, and pepper. Cook and stir until the mixture thickens and comes to a boil.
6. Add spinach and cheese; pour sauce over vegetables and pasta.
7. Cover with foil and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes or until thoroughly heated and cheese is melted.
